overview: A comprehensive geotechnical engineering reference for underground excavation systems. Covers 6 retaining wall types with detailed technical tabs, a powerful comparison dashboard with charts and filters, a research papers library, and a machine learning roadmap page.
features: 6 system detail pages with 8 technical tabs each (Basic, Components, Soil Params, Earth Pressure, FEM, Parameter Effects, Design, Case Studies)
Comparison dashboard with sortable tables, bar/line charts, and filter panel
Research papers library with search, filter, and detail view
ML roadmap page with dataset and model explanations
